    <InputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_421" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="importedStructures"> 
   <object class="java.util.HashMap"> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>http://www.moneygram.com/AgentConnect1512</string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add"> 
       <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xs:schema elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.moneygram.com/AgentConnect1512&quot; xmlns:ac=&quot;http://www.moneygram.com/AgentConnect1512&quot; xmlns:soap=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://www.moneygram.com/AgentConnect1512&quot; xmlns:xmime=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2005/05/xmlmime&quot; xmlns:xs=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.moneygram.com/AgentConnect1512&quot;&gt;
&lt;!--Policy Manager Regex Replaced Internal/External--&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;variableReceiptInfoRequest&quot; type=&quot;ac:VariableReceiptInfoRequest&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;VariableReceiptInfoRequest&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Request&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;1&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;languages&quot;&gt;
                                &lt;xs:complexType&gt;
                                    &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                                        &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;longLanguageCode&quot; type=&quot;ac:LongLanguageCode&quot;/&gt;
                                    &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                                &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
                            &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;variableReceiptInfoResponse&quot; type=&quot;ac:VariableReceiptInfoResponse&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;VariableReceiptInfoResponse&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Response&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;version&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiptText&quot; type=&quot;ac:VariableReceiptTextInfo&quot;/&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;VariableReceiptTextInfo&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;1&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;receiptTextType&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;textTranslation&quot; type=&quot;ac:TextTranslation&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;mimeType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;50&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;ReceiptImagesContentType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;xs:documentation&gt;The collection of images from the POE to appear on
                           the receipts.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;receiptImage&quot; type=&quot;ac:ReceiptImageContentType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;An image originating from the POE and to be
                                         displayed on the receipt.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;ReceiptImageContentType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;xs:documentation&gt;A complex type to define a receipt image with an
                           associated identifier.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;identifier&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;Each unique receipt image sent from the POE must
                                         be accompanied by a unique identifier. The unique identifier is a
                                         key that conforms to one selected from a supported list of
                                         pre-defined values that are displayable on a receipt. Currently
                                         supported images identifiers are:

                                         BARCODE
                                         CUSTOMER_SIGNATURE&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;mimeType&quot; type=&quot;ac:mimeType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;Receipt images sent from the POE will be required
                                         to specify the corresponding mime-type of the image from the
                                         currently supported list:

                                         image/gif
                                         image/jpeg&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;image&quot; type=&quot;xs:base64Binary&quot; xmime:expectedContentTypes=&quot;image/jpeg,image/gif&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;The binary representation of an image to be
                                         displayed on the receipt.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;ReceiptSegmentType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;xs:documentation&gt;Under typical circumstances binary receipts within
                           response payloads are simply returned as a single binary receipt.
                           The exception to this rule is in the context of PDF receipts. For
                           browser-based POEs, newer browsers (e.g. IE11) now do not handle PDF
                           receipts as they conventionally have because of security risks. As a
                           result POEs may specify in a request (or be configured) to convert
                           the generated PDF into equivalent images - one for each page in the
                           PDF receipt - and to return those images instead. When that is the
                           case images must be printed one per page. Consequently, this complex
                           type provides a definition for a receipt &amp;quot;segment&amp;quot; that can be used
                           within a response to hold either an entire PDF binary or a segment
                           of that PDF represented as an image. In the case of the latter the
                           sequence element must be specified to indicate which page of the
                           converted PDF receipt that the image corresponds to.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;sequence&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;For the current receipt segment represented, if
                                         the binary being returned is an image then the sequence element
                                         will additionally be provided with the value (e.g. 1, 2, 3...)
                                         indicating the page of the original PDF that the image corresponds
                                         to. In this way a POE can process and print the receipt images in
                                         an ordered manner if so desired.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;mimeData&quot; type=&quot;xs:base64Binary&quot; xmime:expectedContentTypes=&quot;*/*&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;The current receipt segment binary data. For all
                                         non-image receipt binaries (PDF, Thermal or Text) only a single
                                         receipt segment will be returned and no corresponding sequence
                                         element will be specified in the response payload.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;ReceiptResponseType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;xs:documentation&gt;A complex type definition representing a single
                           receipt. A single receipt may be comprised of either one or
                           potentially more than one receipt mime data &amp;quot;segment&amp;quot; that
                           collectively represents the single receipt. This latter case is
                           applicable for PDF receipts that must be represented and returned to
                           the POE as multiple images - one for each page in the PDF.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;receiptMimeDataSegment&quot; type=&quot;ac:ReceiptSegmentType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;A single binary data segment of a receipt. For
                                         PDF, Thermal and Text receipts will be a binary representation of
                                         the entire receipt. For image binaries will represent a single
                                         page of the converted PDF and thus multiple image binary
                                         &amp;quot;segments&amp;quot; may collectively represent a single PDF receipt.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;PreCompletionReceiptType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;xs:documentation&gt;The receipts returned as part of any
                           validation-side flow for any POE capability (e.g. Sends, Receives,
                           Amends...) are uniquely different than those returned within a
                           commit transaction or complete session response. This complex type
                           provides the validation-side specific receipt response definition.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiptMimeType&quot; type=&quot;ac:mimeType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;The mime-type specifying the format of the
                                         receipt binary being returned. The value specified must conform to
                                         the RFC 2046 standard (see: http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2046.txt).
                                         Currently, the following format options are supported:

                                         image/gif
                                         image/jpeg
                                         application/pdf
                                         application/vnd.thermal
                                         application/vnd.text&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;charsetEncoding&quot; type=&quot;ac:CharsetType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;The charset associated with the base64 encoded
                                         receipt binaries being returned in the response. This should only
                                         be present if the media type identified by the value of the
                                         receiptMimeType element is a TEXT based media type for the receipt
                                         (e.g. application/vnd.thermal OR application/vnd.text). In this
                                         case the charsetEncoding will contain the charset encoding of the
                                         text based receipt (e.g. UTF-8, CP437, etc.). It is left solely up
                                         to a POE implementation as to whether it has any need for the
                                         charset encoding provided. The common use case would be a POE
                                         performing a simple pass through of a server-side generated
                                         receipt on to a printer.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;disclosure1MimeData&quot; type=&quot;ac:ReceiptResponseType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;Binary mime data element containing the pre-pay
                                         disclosure.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;disclosure2MimeData&quot; type=&quot;ac:ReceiptResponseType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;Binary mime data element for pre-pay disclosures
                                         where both a primary and secondary language are specified AND
                                         configuration is set such that a separate receipt is to be
                                         returned for the secondary language.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;CompletionReceiptType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;xs:documentation&gt;The receipts returned as part of any complete
                           session flow for any POE capability are uniquely different than
                           those returned within a validate response. This complex type
                           provides the complete session receipts response definition.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiptMimeType&quot; type=&quot;ac:mimeType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;The mime-type specifying the format of the
                                         receipt binary being returned. The value specified must conform to
                                         the RFC 2046 standard (see: http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2046.txt).
                                         Currently, the following format options are supported:

                                         image/gif
                                         image/jpeg
                                         application/pdf
                                         application/vnd.thermal
                                         application/vnd.text&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;charsetEncoding&quot; type=&quot;ac:CharsetType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;The charset associated with the base64 encoded
                                         receipt binaries being returned in the response. This should only
                                         be present if the media type identified by the value of the
                                         receiptMimeType element is a TEXT based media type for the receipt
                                         (e.g. application/vnd.thermal OR application/vnd.text). In this
                                         case the charsetEncoding will contain the charset encoding of the
                                         text based receipt (e.g. UTF-8, CP437, etc.). It is left solely up
                                         to a POE implementation as to whether it has any need for the
                                         charset encoding provided. The common use case would be a POE
                                         performing a simple pass through of a server-side generated
                                         receipt on to a printer.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;agentReceiptMimeData&quot; type=&quot;ac:ReceiptResponseType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;Binary mime data element containing the agent
                                         specific receipt. Note that for PDF receipts, that this element
                                         will not contain an agent receipt when a POE is configured to have
                                         both agent and consumer receipts merge. In that case both agent
                                         and consumer receipts will be returned as a single PDF which will
                                         appear in the consumerReceipt1MimeData element.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;consumerReceipt1MimeData&quot; type=&quot;ac:ReceiptResponseType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;Binary mime data element containing the consumer
                                         specific receipt. Note that for PDF receipts, that this element
                                         will contain a single PDF containing both agent and consumer
                                         receipt when an agent is configured to have PDF receipts merged
                                         together. When hybrid receipts (i.e. multi-languages on a single
                                         receipt) are configured the hybrid receipt will be returned in
                                         this element.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;consumerReceipt2MimeData&quot; type=&quot;ac:ReceiptResponseType&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:annotation&gt;
                            &lt;xs:documentation&gt;Binary mime data element containing a consumer
                                         specific receipt when both a primary and secondary language are
                                         specified AND configuration is set such that a separate receipt is
                                         to be returned for the secondary language.&lt;/xs:documentation&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:annotation&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;LongLanguageCode&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:length value=&quot;3&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:pattern value=&quot;[a-zA-Z]{3}&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;doddFrankStateRegulatorInfoRequest&quot; type=&quot;ac:DoddFrankStateRegulatorInfoRequest&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;DoddFrankStateRegulatorInfoRequest&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Request&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;dfJurisdiction&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax3&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;1&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;languages&quot;&gt;
                                &lt;xs:complexType&gt;
                                    &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                                        &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;longLanguageCode&quot; type=&quot;ac:LongLanguageCode&quot;/&gt;
                                    &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                                &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
                            &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;doddFrankStateRegulatorInfoResponse&quot; type=&quot;ac:DoddFrankStateRegulatorInfoResponse&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;DoddFrankStateRegulatorInfoResponse&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Response&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;version&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;stateRegulatorInfo&quot; type=&quot;ac:stateRegulatorInfo&quot;/&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;stateRegulatorInfo&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;dfJurisdiction&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;stateRegulatorURL&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax2000&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;stateRegulatorPhone&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax100&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;stateRegulatorName&quot; type=&quot;ac:TextTranslation&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;commitTransactionRequest&quot; type=&quot;ac:CommitTransactionRequest&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;CommitTransactionRequest&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Request&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;mgiTransactionSessionID&quot; type=&quot;ac:mgiTransactionSessionID&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;productType&quot; type=&quot;ac:productType&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;1&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;fieldValues&quot;&gt;
                                &lt;xs:complexType&gt;
                                    &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                                        &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;keyValuePair&quot; type=&quot;ac:KeyValuePair&quot;/&gt;
                                    &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                                &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
                            &lt;/xs:element&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;stateRegulatorVersion&quot; type=&quot;ac:stateRegulatorVersion&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Policy Manager Regex Replaced Internal/External--&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;commitTransactionResponse&quot; type=&quot;ac:CommitTransactionResponse&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;CommitTransactionResponse&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Response&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;referenceNumber&quot; type=&quot;ac:referenceNumber&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;partnerConfirmationNumber&quot; type=&quot;ac:bancomerConfirmationNumber&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;partnerName&quot; type=&quot;ac:partnerName&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;freePhoneCallPIN&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax14&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;tollFreePhoneNumber&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax14&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;expectedDateOfDelivery&quot; type=&quot;xs:date&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;transactionDateTime&quot; type=&quot;xs:dateTime&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Policy Manager Regex Replaced Internal/External--&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiptTextInfo&quot; type=&quot;ac:TextTranslation&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receipts&quot; type=&quot;ac:CompletionReceiptType&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;referenceNumberTextCode&quot; type=&quot;ac:referenceNumberTextCodeType&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;referenceNumberText&quot; type=&quot;ac:referenceNumberTextType&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;referenceNumberConsumerText&quot; type=&quot;ac:referenceNumberTextType&quot;/&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;ReceiptTextDfInfo&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;longLanguageCode&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;textTranslation&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax2000&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;AgentInfo&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;agentName&quot; type=&quot;ac:agentName&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;address&quot; type=&quot;ac:addressType&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;city&quot; type=&quot;ac:agentCityType&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;state&quot; type=&quot;ac:stateType&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiveCapability&quot; type=&quot;xs:boolean&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;sendCapability&quot; type=&quot;xs:boolean&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;agentPhone&quot; type=&quot;ac:phoneType&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;7&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;storeHours&quot; type=&quot;ac:StoreHourInfo&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;amendTransactionRequest&quot; type=&quot;ac:AmendTransactionRequest&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;AmendTransactionRequest&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Request&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;referenceNumber&quot; type=&quot;ac:referenceNumber&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;operatorName&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax80&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiverFirstName&quot; type=&quot;ac:fNameType40&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiverMiddleName&quot; type=&quot;ac:mNameType40&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;receiverLastName&quot; type=&quot;ac:lNameType40&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiverLastName2&quot; type=&quot;ac:lNameType40&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiverNameSuffix&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax30&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiverNameSuffixOther&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax30&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiverFirstNameNotAvailable&quot; type=&quot;xs:boolean&quot;/&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;amendTransactionResponse&quot; type=&quot;ac:AmendTransactionResponse&quot;/&gt;

                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Response&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;transactionSucceeded&quot; type=&quot;xs:boolean&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receipts&quot; type=&quot;ac:PreCompletionReceiptType&quot;/&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;moneyGramConsumerLookupRequest&quot; type=&quot;ac:MoneyGramConsumerLookupRequest&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;MoneyGramConsumerLookupRequest&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Request&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;customerPhone&quot; type=&quot;ac:phoneType14&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;freqCustCardNumber&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax20&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;agentFrequentCustomerNumber&quot; type=&quot;ac:agentFrequentCustomerNumber&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;maxSendersToReturn&quot; type=&quot;ac:intMaxToReturn&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;maxReceiversToReturn&quot; type=&quot;ac:intMaxToReturn&quot;/&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;moneyGramConsumerLookupResponse&quot; type=&quot;ac:MoneyGramConsumerLookupResponse&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;MoneyGramConsumerLookupResponse&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Response&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;senderInfo&quot; type=&quot;ac:SenderLookupInfo&quot;/&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;billPaymentConsumerLookupRequest&quot; type=&quot;ac:BillPaymentConsumerLookupRequest&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;BillPaymentConsumerLookupRequest&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Request&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;customerPhone&quot; type=&quot;ac:phoneType14&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;freqCustCardNumber&quot; type=&quot;ac:stringMax20&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;billerAccountNumber&quot; type=&quot;ac:billerAccountNumber&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;maxSendersToReturn&quot; type=&quot;ac:intMaxToReturn&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;maxReceiversToReturn&quot; type=&quot;ac:intMaxToReturn&quot;/&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;billPaymentConsumerLookupResponse&quot; type=&quot;ac:BillPaymentConsumerLookupResponse&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;BillPaymentConsumerLookupResponse&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:complexContent&gt;
                    &lt;xs:extension base=&quot;ac:Response&quot;&gt;
                        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;senderInfo&quot; type=&quot;ac:SenderLookupInfo&quot;/&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;SenderLookupInfo&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;senderFirstName&quot; type=&quot;ac:fNameType40&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;senderMiddleName&quot; type=&quot;ac:mNameType40&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;senderLastName&quot; type=&quot;ac:lNameType40&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;senderLastName2&quot; type=&quot;ac:lNameType40&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;senderAddress&quot; type=&quot;ac:addressTypeXLong&quot;/&gt;

                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;promotionalMessage&quot; type=&quot;ac:TextTranslation&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;readyForCommit&quot; type=&quot;xs:boolean&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;disclosureText&quot; type=&quot;ac:TextTranslation&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;additionalFieldsToCollect&quot; type=&quot;ac:ProductFieldInfo&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;processingFee&quot; type=&quot;ac:decimal14&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;infoFeeIndicator&quot; type=&quot;xs:boolean&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;1&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;sendAmounts&quot; type=&quot;ac:SendAmountInfo&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;1&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receiveAmounts&quot; type=&quot;ac:ReceiveAmountInfo&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;exchangeRateApplied&quot; type=&quot;ac:decimal14&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;confirmationNumber&quot; type=&quot;ac:confirmationNumber&quot;/&gt;
                            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;receipts&quot; type=&quot;ac:PreCompletionReceiptType&quot;/&gt;
                        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;/xs:extension&gt;
                &lt;/xs:complexContent&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;translationText&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;2000&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;DetailAmounts&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;amountType&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;amount&quot; type=&quot;ac:decimal14nonZero&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; name=&quot;amountCurrency&quot; type=&quot;ac:currencyCode&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;AgentAddress&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;agentAddressLine&quot; type=&quot;ac:addressTypeXLong&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;TextTranslation&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element name=&quot;longLanguageCode&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element name=&quot;textTranslation&quot; type=&quot;ac:translationText&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;timeZoneCorrection&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;timeZoneId&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;offset&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;dstSavings&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;startMode&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;startDay&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;startMonth&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;startDayOfWeek&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;startTime&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;startTimeMode&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;endMode&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;endDay&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;endMonth&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;endDayOfWeek&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;endTime&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;endTimeMode&quot; type=&quot;xs:int&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;VersionInfo&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;versionType&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;versionLevel&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
&lt;!--Policy Manager Regex Replaced Internal/External--&gt;
&lt;!--===========================--&gt;
&lt;!--xs:simpleType definitions--&gt;
&lt;!--===========================--&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;InfoKeyType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;80&quot;/&gt;

            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;

                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;

                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;addressType&quot;&gt;

                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;

                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;agentName&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;40&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;agentNumber&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:length value=&quot;6&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;agentID&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:length value=&quot;8&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;locationCode&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:length value=&quot;8&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;areaCodePrefixType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:length value=&quot;6&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:pattern value=&quot;[0-9]{6}&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;binNumber&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:length value=&quot;6&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:pattern value=&quot;[0-9]{6}&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;month&quot;&gt;

                    &lt;xs:length value=&quot;2&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:pattern value=&quot;[0-9]+&quot;/&gt;

            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;year&quot;&gt;

                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;bancomerConfirmationNumber&quot;&gt;

                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;11&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;billerAccountNumber&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;30&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;checkType&quot;&gt;

            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;cityType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;

            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;cityTypeLong&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;40&quot;/&gt;

            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;agentCityType&quot;&gt;

            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;cityType60&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;60&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
&lt;!--xs:simpleType name=&quot;countyType60&quot;&gt;

    &lt;/xs:simpleType--&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;directionType&quot;&gt;

                    &lt;xs:length value=&quot;7&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
&lt;!--Policy Manager Regex Replaced Internal/External--&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;billPayCancelReasonType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;ENTERED_WRONG_ACCOUNT&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;SENT_TO_WRONG_ACCOUNT&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;SENT_TO_WRONG_BILLER&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;SENT_DUPLICATE_PAYMENT&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;CUSTOMER_CHANGED_MIND&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;CUSTOMER_LEFT_WITHOUT_PAYING&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;SHOULD_BE_EXPRESSPAYMENT&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;SYSTEM_ERROR&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;OTHER&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;channelTypeEnum&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;ATM&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;CALL_CENTER&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;KIOSK&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;LOCATION&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;MOBILE&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;SYSTEM&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;WEB&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;TABLET&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;targetAudienceType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;AGENT_FACING&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;CONSUMER_FACING&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;countryType&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:length value=&quot;3&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:pattern value=&quot;.*\S.*&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;currencyCode&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:length value=&quot;3&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;customerReceiveNumber&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;20&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;dataTypeCode&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;boolean&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;string&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;int&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;decimal&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;date&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;datetime&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;time&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;text&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;cntrycode&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;enum&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;stringbool&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;dayOfWeek&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;MON&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Monday--&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;TUE&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Tuesday--&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;WED&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Wednesday--&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;THU&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Thursday--&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;FRI&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Friday--&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;M-F&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Monday through Friday--&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;S-S&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Saturday and Sunday--&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;SAT&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Saturday--&gt;
                    &lt;xs:enumeration value=&quot;SUN&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Sunday--&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;decimal3&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:decimal&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxExclusive value=&quot;1000&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;decimal4&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:decimal&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxExclusive value=&quot;10000&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;decimal8&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:decimal&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxExclusive value=&quot;100000000&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;decimal9nonZero&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:decimal&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:minExclusive value=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxExclusive value=&quot;1000000000&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;decimal14&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:decimal&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:minInclusive value=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxExclusive value=&quot;100000000000000&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;decimal14nonZero&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:decimal&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:minExclusive value=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxExclusive value=&quot;100000000000000&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;deliveryOption&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;15&quot;/&gt;
&lt;!--Common values are the following:--&gt;
&lt;!--WILL_CALL   (00) Will call--&gt;
&lt;!--HDS_USD     (06) Home Delivery Service: USD Payout--&gt;
&lt;!--HDS_LOCAL   (07) Home Delivery Service: Local Currency Payout--&gt;
&lt;!--HOME_DELIVERY  (08) DSS Home Delivery--&gt;
&lt;!--CARD_DEPOSIT   (09) DSS Card Deposit--&gt;
&lt;!--BANK_DEPOSIT   (10) DSS Bank Deposit--&gt;
&lt;!--The following are only supported for backwards compatibility--&gt;
&lt;!--OTHER      (00) Will call--&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;deliveryOptionDisplayName&quot;&gt;
                &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;xs:maxLength value=&quot;50&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;

            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;EnumType&quot;&gt;

            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;feeType&quot;&gt;

            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;genderType&quot;&gt;

                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;

                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
&lt;!--xs:simpleType name=&quot;fName&quot;&gt;
	    &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;

            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;

                &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;lNameType40&quot;&gt;

            &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;
            &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;int1&quot;&gt;

 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition">
